source_notes: MONDAY RUN 2026-05-25. Top trade-shape watchlist for Bank Holiday Monday. Public sources preview Notts County vs Salford City as the League Two Play-Off Final at Wembley on Bank Holiday Monday, with bookmakers rating the teams closely/equally and Salford carrying strong recent head-to-head form. This is the cleanest 2UP shape of the day because it is a high-liquidity Wembley final with balanced match odds rather than a one-sided favourite. Strategy read: possible double-sided 2UP candidate if Rory's account shows 2UP and both back/lay spreads are tight. Data caveat: no dedicated Notts County/Salford baseline row exists in the repo yet, so this is market/context-led rather than model-led. Human layer required before trade ranking: confirm 2UP is showing; send Notts back/lay, Salford back/lay, exchange liquidity, stake limits, and any free-bet/reload terms. Use Rory's default 2% commission for headline QL.

MONDAY RUN 2026-05-25. Strong evening watchlist. Public sources preview Wolfsburg vs Paderborn as the second leg of the Bundesliga promotion/relegation play-off on Monday at 20:30 after a 0-0 first leg; talkSPORT also marks Wolfsburg to win as Bet of the Day and notes Wolfsburg dominated the first leg shot/possession profile while Paderborn have a key suspension. Strategy read: likely good exchange liquidity and likely 2UP coverage, but less attractive than Notts/Salford until back/lay is known because Wolfsburg could be a controlled favourite rather than a chaotic 2UP collapse candidate. Human layer required: confirm 2UP, Wolfsburg back/lay, optional Paderborn back/lay if double-sided, liquidity and stake limits. Use 2% commission headline QL.
